# Center City Bailbonds
> bail bonds service, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania

Center City Bailbonds provides 24/7 bail bond services in Philadelphia, PA. Licensed and bonded bail bondsman serving all of Philadelphia and surrounding areas with fast, reliable bail bonds for all charges.

## Services
- Drug Charge Bailbonds
- DUI / DWI Bailbonds
- Felony Charges Bailbonds
- Probation/Parole Violations
- Theft Charges Bailbonds
- Violent Crimes Bailbonds
- Sex Crimes Bailbonds
- Domestic Violence Bailbonds
- White Collar Crimes Bailbonds

## Service Area
Philadelphia, Pennsylvania and surrounding areas

## Contact
- Phone: (215) 870-8197
- Address: 1238 South Street, Philadelphia, PA 19147
- Website: https://www.centercitybailbonds.com

## Key Pages
- Home (/): 24/7 bail bond services with competitive 5% rates and flexible payment plans
- Privacy Policy (/privacy-policy.html): Information collection and privacy practices for bail bond services

## About
Center City Bailbonds is a licensed and bonded bail bond service operating 24/7 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. We offer competitive 5% bail bonds with flexible payment plans and no credit check required. Our experienced team provides fast, confidential bail services for all types of charges including drug offenses, DUI/DWI, felonies, and more.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does a bail bond cost?**
Center City Bailbonds offers competitive 5% bail bonds with flexible payment plans. No credit check required — your signature is your credit.

**How long does it take to get someone out of jail?**
Release times vary by facility, but we work 24/7 to process bail bonds as quickly as possible, often within a few hours of posting bond.

**Do you offer payment plans?**
Yes, Center City Bailbonds offers flexible payment plans with no credit check required.

**Are you available 24/7?**
Yes, Center City Bailbonds provides 24/7 emergency dispatch and bail bond services throughout Philadelphia and surrounding areas.

**Can you help with outstanding warrants?**
Yes. We can arrange walk-throughs, allowing defendants to be processed and released without spending unnecessary time in jail.
